name: jhipster-forge
description: First dedicated Claude Code plugin for JHipster 8.x — generate entities, DTOs, JDL models, services with production-grade architectural patterns built-in.

plugins.name: jhipster-forge
plugins.description: Generate JHipster 8.x entities, DTOs, JDL models, services and more from Claude Code. Includes Sealed Interface, Strategy+Registry, Collect-Then-Fail, MapStruct patterns. Supports monolith and microservices/gateway.
